Working With tidycensus

Source: vignettes/tidycensus-workflows.Rmd
tidycensus-workflows.Rmd
library(griddy)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)

This vignette is a template for ACS workflows. It is not evaluated during package checks because it requires a Census API key and live data.

library(tidycensus)
library(sf)
library(spdep)

years <- c(2012, 2017, 2022)

acs <- purrr::map_dfr(years, function(y) {
  get_acs(
    geography = "tract",
    variables = "B19013_001",
    state = "CA",
    county = "San Francisco",
    year = y,
    survey = "acs5",
    geometry = TRUE
  ) |>
    transmute(
      GEOID,
      year = y,
      median_income = estimate,
      geometry
    )
})

geography <- acs |>
  filter(year == max(year)) |>
  arrange(GEOID)

panel <- acs |>
  st_drop_geometry() |>
  left_join(select(geography, GEOID, geometry), by = "GEOID") |>
  st_as_sf()

nb <- poly2nb(geography, queen = TRUE)

classes <- classify_dynamics(panel, GEOID, year, median_income, k = 5)
classic <- markov_dynamics(classes, GEOID, year, class)
spatial <- spatial_markov(panel, GEOID, year, median_income, nb = nb, k = 5)
mobility <- rank_mobility(panel, GEOID, year, median_income)

plot_transition_matrix(classic)
plot_spatial_markov(spatial)
plot_rank_mobility(mobility)

For package-ready examples, cache a small static panel instead of calling the API at build time.

Developed by Dmitry Shkolnik.

Site built with pkgdown 2.1.3.
